name: BrepFace.ShrinkDisableSide
summary: Defines bitwise mask flags indicating what side of a surface to not shrink.

enum_values.name: DoNotShrinkWestSide
enum_values.summary: Do not shrink on the west side of domain.

enum_values.name: DoNotShrinkSouthSide
enum_values.summary: Do not shrink on the south side of domain.

enum_values.name: DoNotShrinkEastSide
enum_values.summary: Do not shrink on the east side of domain.

enum_values.name: DoNotShrinkNorthSide
enum_values.summary: Do not shrink on the north side of domain.
